name: cascade-memory
description: 6-layer memory architecture with temporal decay - episodic, semantic, procedural, meta, identity, and working memory layers
long_description:
# CASCADE Memory System

A complete 6-layer memory architecture for persistent structured memory:

- **Episodic Memory**: Events, experiences, conversations
- **Semantic Memory**: Knowledge, facts, definitions
- **Procedural Memory**: Skills, processes, how-to
- **Meta Memory**: Insights, patterns, conclusions
- **Identity Memory**: Core values, preferences, characteristics
- **Working Memory**: Temporary context, active tasks

Built for sub-millisecond access with SQLite backend and temporal decay scoring.

cascade_db_path.title: CASCADE Database Directory
cascade_db_path.description: Path to CASCADE database directory containing the 6-layer memory system

tools.description: Query a specific memory layer (episodic, semantic, procedural, meta, identity, working)

tools.description: Get detailed statistics for all memory layers

tools.name: save_to_layer
tools.description: Save memory to a specific layer with full metadata control
